TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lay cingte pakatifac to singkiw: Romakat i mo'ecelay a lalan ko Taywan, pasifana' to i hekalay tomirengay itini i nikapolongan ko Taywan. == Laloma'ay papotalay no kitakit a mitiya widang, nga'ay ho, miahowid to pihadidi no faloco' namo a mitala. Conghuaminko saka 16 rekad singkiw to congtong, micokeray to congtong ato saka 11 rekad singkiw to lipoiing, manga'ay ko kalaheci anini. Miahowid to finawlan no Taywan mapolong mitilid to nikapolongan fa'elohay pifelih, pasi hekal pahapinang to kalimelaen a nikapolongan a telekan, o nian o caay ko sasawaden no mita a nihinakeran. Miahowid kako to tatosaay a sakalalifet ako, pahapinangay to nikapolongan a pinangan nangra, i 'ayaw no nian pasiiked patingwa kako cangraan to sowal; mipalemed kako to nikeridan sician a kasarekad nangra, itini to i kalomaocan maalaay a tamdaw, nanay i ikor o marikecay makakomod to saki kitakit. I 2024 mihecaan o sata'akay no hekal a singkiw, o sa'ayaway ta'akay a singkiw nengnengen, orasaka itini i Taywan milengat to nikapolongan singkiw no katifac koni. Onini a katifacan, toloay ko tadamaanay pahecian: Saka cecay pahecian, pasifana' to hekal ko Taywan, itini i nikapolongan ato misatekaday, pasayraay i nikapolongananay ko nipili'an a tomireng. Conghuaminko Taywan, o papado'edo ato nikapolongan a widang i kasakitakit malahakelong romalat. Saka tosa a pahecian, pakaynien no finawlan no Taywan a demak, maleko matena' to sapicomod no papotalay a 'icel. Nawhani paso'elin kita, o niyah ko misingkiway to no niyah a congtong. Saka tolo a pahecian, tatoloay sakapot ko misingkiway, ci Lai Hsiao sakapot ko sa'adihayay micokeray, citodong mikerid to kitakit pasayra i mo'ecelay a lalan, caay ka selic, caay ko papatikol a romakat. Miahowid kako ci Cayingwen congtong, ato citodongay mikowan a kasakapot, toni faloay miheca misafaloco' a misa'icel, mifalic patireng to Taywan, paneker to parena'an. Ci Lay cinte (Lai Qing-de) ato Hsiao Bi-khim, o papa'icel to nia parana'an, o saka cekal no kitakit a romakat, o saka fangcal no 'orip ni finawlan. Nikawrira, o singkiw no kalomaocan no kitakit, caay ka litosa ko matifacay, o nikaeca pisa'icel no niyam, o sasaimeren misapo'ener mihirateng konini. O paheci no pisingkiw pakafana' titaanan, pafaloco ko finawlan "ci'icelay sifo" ato "pacofcoay ko pi'emet". O fa'elohay a lomaocay, o kakafana'en no mita, masasiodo' konini. Misi'ayaw to fa'elhay lalekoan no kalomaoc no kitakit, o papasayra i "kasasipaini, kasasowalan, mikihatiyaay, makakomoday" a sici ko Taywan, paini kako to nian: Saka 1, o mamisafaloco' kako to kalalifetan ako a wacay ato pakayraan nangra, ano o sakalemed no finawlan i, saka cowat no kitakit a kangalayan, o mamiwada kako to saki no makoan a dademaken. Saka 2, ikoray a cacitodong a midemakay, o mipakayraay kako to nikapolongan a kasanipatekoan, caay pisateked to kasarekad, o nga'ayay tamdaw ko pitahidang, nanay o kasa lekad pa'ayaw to tadamaanay tamdaw, mapolong to sakacomahad no kitakit misa'icel. Saka 3, ikoray a sademaken no sifo, kasarekad no kalacecayan a demak, o nian ko 'ayaw midemak. Awaay ho kakomodan awaay ho kakalahan, pakitiraen ho ko kalaliyangan, kadado'edo ko kasasipaini. Saka 4, kahinatalaan ko nian misalof a tadamanay, tinako o lawpow, cienpaw a kinaira a payso a midotoc, patirengen ako ko kasasipainian a pitelekan, misadadahal kasasowalan a parena'an, mihaop to pikihatiya no finawlan, misatifac to kasarekad maaini, mikilim to ta'akay kalacecayaw no syakay. Pado'edo to saka cekal rihaday no kasatatapalan, o nian ko spatosokan no mako a mala congtong. Pakaynien ako i Conghuaminko kimpo a telek, caay ka talarikor caay ka lata'ang, midotoc to kamatini, masasiodo'ay kasaso'ayaw, o kasasipaini ko sapilikot, kasasowalan ko kasasiliyang, paifaloco'ay ko kasasirakat makakomod to Congko, sakacakat no kalemed finawlan no kasatatapal, mapatangasa ko karihaday a patosokan. Nikawrira misi'ayaw to pipatalaw to sapilood no Congko, ira ko sapisimaw no faloco' ako to Taywan. Miliyaw haca kako miahowid to finawlan no Taywan, pili'en nano ci Lay Hsiao tatosa, kalita'angan niyam, o mamisa'icel kami to nian, caay papisomad to patorodan namo. Paherek to ko singkiw, o palong no kalalifetan a siwtoc ato kalalifet, o papahereken a tahini aca. 2300 'ofad no finawlan, o malacecayay laloma'an, kao pado'edoay kalakayatay marikecay makakomod, micikeroh mido'edo patala'ayaw romakat to kitakit. Ahowiday kita apolong. Mifalicay to tilid: Ci Masao Nikar 連結網址:
S.PHON: == ɾaj ʦiŋtə pakatifaʦ to~u siŋkiw: ro~umakat i mo~uʡəʦəɾaj a ɾaɾan ko~u tajwan, pasifanaʡ to~u i ħəkaɾaj to~umirəŋaj itini i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u tajwan. == ɾaɾo~umaʡaj papo~utaɾaj no~u kitakit a mitija wiɬ~ɮaŋ, ŋaʡaj ħo~u, miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u piħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ namo~u a mitaɾa. ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ siŋkiw to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ato~u saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ siŋkiw to~u ɾipo~uiiŋ, maŋaʡaj ko~u kaɾaħəʦi anini. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan mapo~uɾo~uŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan faʡəɾo~uħaj pifəɾiħ, pasi ħəkaɾ paħapinaŋ to~u kaɾiməɾaən a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a təɾəkan, o~u nian o~u ʦaaj ko~u sasawaɬ~ɮən no~u mita a niħinakəran. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u tato~usaaj a sakaɾaɾifət ako~u, paħapinaŋaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a pinaŋan naŋra, i ʡajaw no~u nian pasiikəɬ~ɮ patiŋwa kako~u ʦaŋraan to~u so~uwaɾ; mipaɾəməɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u nikəriɬ~ɮan siʦian a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ naŋra, itini to~u i kaɾo~umao~uʦan maaɾaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, nanaj i iko~ur o~u marikəʦaj makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u saki kitakit. i **** miħəʦaan o~u sataʡakaj no~u ħəkaɾ a siŋkiw, o~u saʡajawaj taʡakaj a siŋkiw nəŋnəŋən, o~urasaka itini i tajwan miɾəŋat to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan siŋkiw no~u katifaʦ ko~uni. o~unini a katifaʦan, to~uɾo~uaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj paħəʦian: saka ʦəʦaj paħəʦian, pasifanaʡ to~u ħəkaɾ ko~u tajwan, itini i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ato~u misatəkaɬ~ɮaj, pasajraaj i nikapo~uɾo~uŋananaj ko~u nipiɾiʡan a to~umirəŋ. ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u tajwan, o~u papaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a wiɬ~ɮaŋ i kasakitakit maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ro~umaɾat. saka to~usa a paħəʦian, pakajniən no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾəko~u matənaʡ to~u sapiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u papo~utaɾaj a ʡiʦəɾ. nawħani paso~uʡəɾin kita, o~u nijaħ ko~u misiŋkiwaj to~u no~u nijaħ a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ. saka to~uɾo~u a paħəʦian, tato~uɾo~uaj sakapo~ut ko~u misiŋkiwaj, ʦi ɾai ħsiao~u sakapo~ut ko~u saʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj miʦo~ukəraj, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kitakit pasajra i mo~uʡəʦəɾaj a ɾaɾan, ʦaaj ka səɾiʦ, ʦaaj ko~u papatiko~uɾ a ro~umakat. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kako~u ʦi ʦajiŋwən ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan a kasakapo~ut, to~uni faɾo~uaj miħəʦa misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a misaʡiʦəɾ, mifaɾiʦ patirəŋ to~u tajwan, panəkər to~u parənaʡan. ʦi ɾaj ʦintə (ɾai *iŋ-ɬ~ɮə) ato~u ħsiao~u b~b~vi-kħim, o~u papaʡiʦəɾ to~u nia paranaʡan, o~u saka ʦəkaɾ no~u kitakit a ro~umakat, o~u saka faŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip ni finawɾan. nikawrira, o~u siŋkiw no~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit, ʦaaj ka ɾito~usa ko~u matifaʦaj, o~u nikaəʦa pisaʡiʦəɾ no~u nijam, o~u sasaimərən misapo~uʡənər miħiratəŋ ko~unini. o~u paħəʦi no~u pisiŋkiw pakafanaʡ titaanan, pafaɾo~uʦo~u ko~u finawɾan "ʦiʡiʦəɾaj sifo~u" ato~u "paʦo~ufʦo~uaj ko~u piʡəmət". o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a ɾo~umao~uʦaj, o~u kakafanaʡən no~u mita, masasio~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ ko~unini. misiʡajaw to~u faʡəɾħaj ɾaɾəko~uan no~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ no~u kitakit, o~u papasajra i "kasasipaini, kasaso~uwaɾan, mikiħatijaaj, makako~umo~uɬ~ɮaj" a siʦi ko~u tajwan, paini kako~u to~u nian: saka *, o~u mamisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ kako~u to~u kaɾaɾifətan ako~u a waʦaj ato~u pakajraan naŋra, ano~u o~u sakaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan i, saka ʦo~uwat no~u kitakit a kaŋaɾajan, o~u mamiwaɬ~ɮa kako~u to~u saki no~u mako~uan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən. saka *, iko~uraj a ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a miɬ~ɮəmakaj, o~u mipakajraaj kako~u to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a kasanipatəko~uan, ʦaaj pisatəkəɬ~ɮ to~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ, o~u ŋaʡajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nanaj o~u kasa ɾəkaɬ~ɮ paʡajaw to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapo~uɾo~uŋ to~u sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u kitakit misaʡiʦəɾ. saka *, iko~uraj a saɬ~ɮəmakən no~u sifo~u, kasarəkaɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾaʦəʦajan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u nian ko~u ʡajaw miɬ~ɮəmak. awaaj ħo~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan awaaj ħo~u kakaɾaħan, pakitiraən ħo~u ko~u kaɾaɾijaŋan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kasasipaini. saka *, kaħinataɾaan ko~u nian misaɾo~uf a taɬ~ɮamanaj, tinako~u o~u ɾawpo~uw, ʦiənpaw a kinaira a pajso~u a miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ, patirəŋən ako~u ko~u kasasipainian a pitəɾəkan, misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ kasaso~uwaɾan a parənaʡan, miħao~up to~u pikiħatija no~u finawɾan, misatifaʦ to~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ maaini, mikiɾim to~u taʡakaj kaɾaʦəʦajaw no~u sjakaj. paɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u to~u saka ʦəkaɾ riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u kasatatapaɾan, o~u nian ko~u spato~uso~ukan no~u mako~u a maɾa ʦo~uŋto~uŋ. pakajniən ako~u i ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kimpo~u a təɾək, ʦaaj ka taɾariko~ur ʦaaj ka ɾataʡaŋ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u kamatini, masasio~uɬ~ɮo~uʡaj kasaso~uʡajaw, o~u kasasipaini ko~u sapiɾiko~ut, kasaso~uwaɾan ko~u kasasiɾijaŋ, paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u kasasirakat makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, sakaʦakat no~u kaɾəməɬ~ɮ finawɾan no~u kasatatapaɾ, mapataŋasa ko~u kariħaɬ~ɮaj a pato~uso~ukan. nikawrira misiʡajaw to~u pipataɾaw to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, ira ko~u sapisimaw no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u to~u tajwan. miɾijaw ħaʦa kako~u miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan, piɾiʡən nano~u ʦi ɾaj ħsiao~u tato~usa, kaɾitaʡaŋan nijam, o~u mamisaʡiʦəɾ kami to~u nian, ʦaaj papiso~umaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan namo~u. paħərək to~u ko~u siŋkiw, o~u paɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾaɾifətan a siwto~uʦ ato~u kaɾaɾifət, o~u papaħərəkən a taħini aʦa. **** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan, o~u maɾaʦəʦajaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan, kao~u paɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uaj kaɾakajataj marikəʦaj makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦikəro~uħ miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u pataɾaʡajaw ro~umakat to~u kitakit. aħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj kita apo~uɾo~uŋ. mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ: ʦi masao~u nikar ****:
S.FORM: == Lay cingte pakatifac to singkiw: Romakat i mo'ecelay a lalan ko Taywan, pasifana' to i hekalay tomirengay itini i nikapolongan ko Taywan. == Laloma'ay papotalay no kitakit a mitiya widang, nga'ay ho, miahowid to pihadidi no faloco' namo a mitala. Conghuaminko saka 16 rekad singkiw to congtong, micokeray to congtong ato saka 11 rekad singkiw to lipoiing, manga'ay ko kalaheci anini. Miahowid to finawlan no Taywan mapolong mitilid to nikapolongan fa'elohay pifelih, pasi hekal pahapinang to kalimelaen a nikapolongan a telekan, o nian o caay ko sasawaden no mita a nihinakeran. Miahowid kako to tatosaay a sakalalifet ako, pahapinangay to nikapolongan a pinangan nangra, i 'ayaw no nian pasiiked patingwa kako cangraan to sowal; mipalemed kako to nikeridan sician a kasarekad nangra, itini to i kalomaocan maalaay a tamdaw, nanay i ikor o marikecay makakomod to saki kitakit. I 2024 mihecaan o sata'akay no hekal a singkiw, o sa'ayaway ta'akay a singkiw nengnengen, orasaka itini i Taywan milengat to nikapolongan singkiw no katifac koni. Onini a katifacan, toloay ko tadamaanay pahecian: Saka cecay pahecian, pasifana' to hekal ko Taywan, itini i nikapolongan ato misatekaday, pasayraay i nikapolongananay ko nipili'an a tomireng. Conghuaminko Taywan, o papado'edo ato nikapolongan a widang i kasakitakit malahakelong romalat. Saka tosa a pahecian, pakaynien no finawlan no Taywan a demak, maleko matena' to sapicomod no papotalay a 'icel. Nawhani paso'elin kita, o niyah ko misingkiway to no niyah a congtong. Saka tolo a pahecian, tatoloay sakapot ko misingkiway, ci Lai Hsiao sakapot ko sa'adihayay micokeray, citodong mikerid to kitakit pasayra i mo'ecelay a lalan, caay ka selic, caay ko papatikol a romakat. Miahowid kako ci Cayingwen congtong, ato citodongay mikowan a kasakapot, toni faloay miheca misafaloco' a misa'icel, mifalic patireng to Taywan, paneker to parena'an. Ci Lay cinte (Lai Qing-de) ato Hsiao Bi-khim, o papa'icel to nia parana'an, o saka cekal no kitakit a romakat, o saka fangcal no 'orip ni finawlan. Nikawrira, o singkiw no kalomaocan no kitakit, caay ka litosa ko matifacay, o nikaeca pisa'icel no niyam, o sasaimeren misapo'ener mihirateng konini. O paheci no pisingkiw pakafana' titaanan, pafaloco ko finawlan "ci'icelay sifo" ato "pacofcoay ko pi'emet". O fa'elohay a lomaocay, o kakafana'en no mita, masasiodo' konini. Misi'ayaw to fa'elhay lalekoan no kalomaoc no kitakit, o papasayra i "kasasipaini, kasasowalan, mikihatiyaay, makakomoday" a sici ko Taywan, paini kako to nian: Saka 1, o mamisafaloco' kako to kalalifetan ako a wacay ato pakayraan nangra, ano o sakalemed no finawlan i, saka cowat no kitakit a kangalayan, o mamiwada kako to saki no makoan a dademaken. Saka 2, ikoray a cacitodong a midemakay, o mipakayraay kako to nikapolongan a kasanipatekoan, caay pisateked to kasarekad, o nga'ayay tamdaw ko pitahidang, nanay o kasa lekad pa'ayaw to tadamaanay tamdaw, mapolong to sakacomahad no kitakit misa'icel. Saka 3, ikoray a sademaken no sifo, kasarekad no kalacecayan a demak, o nian ko 'ayaw midemak. Awaay ho kakomodan awaay ho kakalahan, pakitiraen ho ko kalaliyangan, kadado'edo ko kasasipaini. Saka 4, kahinatalaan ko nian misalof a tadamanay, tinako o lawpow, cienpaw a kinaira a payso a midotoc, patirengen ako ko kasasipainian a pitelekan, misadadahal kasasowalan a parena'an, mihaop to pikihatiya no finawlan, misatifac to kasarekad maaini, mikilim to ta'akay kalacecayaw no syakay. Pado'edo to saka cekal rihaday no kasatatapalan, o nian ko spatosokan no mako a mala congtong. Pakaynien ako i Conghuaminko kimpo a telek, caay ka talarikor caay ka lata'ang, midotoc to kamatini, masasiodo'ay kasaso'ayaw, o kasasipaini ko sapilikot, kasasowalan ko kasasiliyang, paifaloco'ay ko kasasirakat makakomod to Congko, sakacakat no kalemed finawlan no kasatatapal, mapatangasa ko karihaday a patosokan. Nikawrira misi'ayaw to pipatalaw to sapilood no Congko, ira ko sapisimaw no faloco' ako to Taywan. Miliyaw haca kako miahowid to finawlan no Taywan, pili'en nano ci Lay Hsiao tatosa, kalita'angan niyam, o mamisa'icel kami to nian, caay papisomad to patorodan namo. Paherek to ko singkiw, o palong no kalalifetan a siwtoc ato kalalifet, o papahereken a tahini aca. 2300 'ofad no finawlan, o malacecayay laloma'an, kao pado'edoay kalakayatay marikecay makakomod, micikeroh mido'edo patala'ayaw romakat to kitakit. Ahowiday kita apolong. Mifalicay to tilid: Ci Masao Nikar 連結網址:
S.PHON: == ɾaj ʦiŋtə pakatifaʦ to~u siŋkiw: ro~umakat i mo~uʡəʦəɾaj a ɾaɾan ko~u tajwan, pasifanaʡ to~u i ħəkaɾaj to~umirəŋaj itini i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u tajwan. == ɾaɾo~umaʡaj papo~utaɾaj no~u kitakit a mitija wiɬ~ɮaŋ, ŋaʡaj ħo~u, miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u piħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ namo~u a mitaɾa. ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ siŋkiw to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, miʦo~ukəraj to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ato~u saka ** rəkaɬ~ɮ siŋkiw to~u ɾipo~uiiŋ, maŋaʡaj ko~u kaɾaħəʦi anini. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan mapo~uɾo~uŋ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan faʡəɾo~uħaj pifəɾiħ, pasi ħəkaɾ paħapinaŋ to~u kaɾiməɾaən a nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a təɾəkan, o~u nian o~u ʦaaj ko~u sasawaɬ~ɮən no~u mita a niħinakəran. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u tato~usaaj a sakaɾaɾifət ako~u, paħapinaŋaj to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a pinaŋan naŋra, i ʡajaw no~u nian pasiikəɬ~ɮ patiŋwa kako~u ʦaŋraan to~u so~uwaɾ; mipaɾəməɬ~ɮ kako~u to~u nikəriɬ~ɮan siʦian a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ naŋra, itini to~u i kaɾo~umao~uʦan maaɾaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, nanaj i iko~ur o~u marikəʦaj makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u saki kitakit. i **** miħəʦaan o~u sataʡakaj no~u ħəkaɾ a siŋkiw, o~u saʡajawaj taʡakaj a siŋkiw nəŋnəŋən, o~urasaka itini i tajwan miɾəŋat to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan siŋkiw no~u katifaʦ ko~uni. o~unini a katifaʦan, to~uɾo~uaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj paħəʦian: saka ʦəʦaj paħəʦian, pasifanaʡ to~u ħəkaɾ ko~u tajwan, itini i nikapo~uɾo~uŋan ato~u misatəkaɬ~ɮaj, pasajraaj i nikapo~uɾo~uŋananaj ko~u nipiɾiʡan a to~umirəŋ. ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u tajwan, o~u papaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ato~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a wiɬ~ɮaŋ i kasakitakit maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ro~umaɾat. saka to~usa a paħəʦian, pakajniən no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾəko~u matənaʡ to~u sapiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u papo~utaɾaj a ʡiʦəɾ. nawħani paso~uʡəɾin kita, o~u nijaħ ko~u misiŋkiwaj to~u no~u nijaħ a ʦo~uŋto~uŋ. saka to~uɾo~u a paħəʦian, tato~uɾo~uaj sakapo~ut ko~u misiŋkiwaj, ʦi ɾai ħsiao~u sakapo~ut ko~u saʡaɬ~ɮiħajaj miʦo~ukəraj, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u kitakit pasajra i mo~uʡəʦəɾaj a ɾaɾan, ʦaaj ka səɾiʦ, ʦaaj ko~u papatiko~uɾ a ro~umakat. miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ kako~u ʦi ʦajiŋwən ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, ato~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan a kasakapo~ut, to~uni faɾo~uaj miħəʦa misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ a misaʡiʦəɾ, mifaɾiʦ patirəŋ to~u tajwan, panəkər to~u parənaʡan. ʦi ɾaj ʦintə (ɾai *iŋ-ɬ~ɮə) ato~u ħsiao~u b~b~vi-kħim, o~u papaʡiʦəɾ to~u nia paranaʡan, o~u saka ʦəkaɾ no~u kitakit a ro~umakat, o~u saka faŋʦaɾ no~u ʡo~urip ni finawɾan. nikawrira, o~u siŋkiw no~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit, ʦaaj ka ɾito~usa ko~u matifaʦaj, o~u nikaəʦa pisaʡiʦəɾ no~u nijam, o~u sasaimərən misapo~uʡənər miħiratəŋ ko~unini. o~u paħəʦi no~u pisiŋkiw pakafanaʡ titaanan, pafaɾo~uʦo~u ko~u finawɾan "ʦiʡiʦəɾaj sifo~u" ato~u "paʦo~ufʦo~uaj ko~u piʡəmət". o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a ɾo~umao~uʦaj, o~u kakafanaʡən no~u mita, masasio~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ ko~unini. misiʡajaw to~u faʡəɾħaj ɾaɾəko~uan no~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ no~u kitakit, o~u papasajra i "kasasipaini, kasaso~uwaɾan, mikiħatijaaj, makako~umo~uɬ~ɮaj" a siʦi ko~u tajwan, paini kako~u to~u nian: saka *, o~u mamisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ kako~u to~u kaɾaɾifətan ako~u a waʦaj ato~u pakajraan naŋra, ano~u o~u sakaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan i, saka ʦo~uwat no~u kitakit a kaŋaɾajan, o~u mamiwaɬ~ɮa kako~u to~u saki no~u mako~uan a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən. saka *, iko~uraj a ʦaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a miɬ~ɮəmakaj, o~u mipakajraaj kako~u to~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan a kasanipatəko~uan, ʦaaj pisatəkəɬ~ɮ to~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ, o~u ŋaʡajaj tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ, nanaj o~u kasa ɾəkaɬ~ɮ paʡajaw to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw, mapo~uɾo~uŋ to~u sakaʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ no~u kitakit misaʡiʦəɾ. saka *, iko~uraj a saɬ~ɮəmakən no~u sifo~u, kasarəkaɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾaʦəʦajan a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u nian ko~u ʡajaw miɬ~ɮəmak. awaaj ħo~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan awaaj ħo~u kakaɾaħan, pakitiraən ħo~u ko~u kaɾaɾijaŋan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u ko~u kasasipaini. saka *, kaħinataɾaan ko~u nian misaɾo~uf a taɬ~ɮamanaj, tinako~u o~u ɾawpo~uw, ʦiənpaw a kinaira a pajso~u a miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ, patirəŋən ako~u ko~u kasasipainian a pitəɾəkan, misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ kasaso~uwaɾan a parənaʡan, miħao~up to~u pikiħatija no~u finawɾan, misatifaʦ to~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ maaini, mikiɾim to~u taʡakaj kaɾaʦəʦajaw no~u sjakaj. paɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u to~u saka ʦəkaɾ riħaɬ~ɮaj no~u kasatatapaɾan, o~u nian ko~u spato~uso~ukan no~u mako~u a maɾa ʦo~uŋto~uŋ. pakajniən ako~u i ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u kimpo~u a təɾək, ʦaaj ka taɾariko~ur ʦaaj ka ɾataʡaŋ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u kamatini, masasio~uɬ~ɮo~uʡaj kasaso~uʡajaw, o~u kasasipaini ko~u sapiɾiko~ut, kasaso~uwaɾan ko~u kasasiɾijaŋ, paifaɾo~uʦo~uʡaj ko~u kasasirakat makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ʦo~uŋko~u, sakaʦakat no~u kaɾəməɬ~ɮ finawɾan no~u kasatatapaɾ, mapataŋasa ko~u kariħaɬ~ɮaj a pato~uso~ukan. nikawrira misiʡajaw to~u pipataɾaw to~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, ira ko~u sapisimaw no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ako~u to~u tajwan. miɾijaw ħaʦa kako~u miaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan no~u tajwan, piɾiʡən nano~u ʦi ɾaj ħsiao~u tato~usa, kaɾitaʡaŋan nijam, o~u mamisaʡiʦəɾ kami to~u nian, ʦaaj papiso~umaɬ~ɮ to~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan namo~u. paħərək to~u ko~u siŋkiw, o~u paɾo~uŋ no~u kaɾaɾifətan a siwto~uʦ ato~u kaɾaɾifət, o~u papaħərəkən a taħini aʦa. **** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u finawɾan, o~u maɾaʦəʦajaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan, kao~u paɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uaj kaɾakajataj marikəʦaj makako~umo~uɬ~ɮ, miʦikəro~uħ miɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u pataɾaʡajaw ro~umakat to~u kitakit. aħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj kita apo~uɾo~uŋ. mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ: ʦi masao~u nikar ****:
